name: Azure Entra ID (Microsoft Graph)

auth.notes: Application permissions (client_credentials flow) require admin consent. For user provisioning automation, use client_credentials grant type with application permissions rather than delegated permissions. No revoke endpoint; tokens expire naturally (default 1 hour). Use https://graph.microsoft.com/.default as the scope when requesting tokens.

api.rateLimits: 130,000 requests per 10 seconds per app across all tenants. Service-specific limits vary. Throttled requests return HTTP 429 with Retry-After header. Directory operations (users/groups): ~10,000 requests per 10 seconds per tenant.

scim.endpoint: Entra ID acts as a SCIM client (provisioning to other apps), not a SCIM server. Use Microsoft Graph API for inbound provisioning.
scim.notes: Entra ID supports outbound SCIM provisioning to gallery and non-gallery applications. For inbound provisioning (provisioning into Entra ID), use the /bulkUpload API endpoint at POST /v1.0/servicePrincipals/{id}/synchronization/jobs/{id}/bulkUpload. Rate limit: 40 requests per 5 seconds, 2,000-6,000 per 24 hours depending on license.

webhooks.notes: Microsoft Graph change notifications (webhooks) support monitoring users, groups, and directory objects. Subscriptions require a publicly accessible HTTPS endpoint. Can also use Azure Event Hubs for delivery. Subscription max lifetime varies: 4,230 minutes for directory resources.

sandbox.notes: Microsoft 365 Developer Program provides a free E5 sandbox tenant with 25 user licenses, pre-configured users, groups, and mailboxes. Requires qualifying subscription (Visual Studio, ISV Success, Partner Program). Alternatively, create a free Azure account to get an Entra ID Free tier tenant with option to activate P1/P2 trial.

needs_verification: Exact per-tenant rate limits for directory operations (Microsoft does not publish precise numbers for all endpoints)
Whether Retry-After header value is in seconds or a date
Bulk upload API availability by license tier (Entra ID P1 vs P2 vs Governance)
